full_text:
Du Qiong (Boyu) 杜瓊 (伯瑜)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Du Qiong (杜瓊), styledBoyu (伯瑜), was born in Shu. A teacher of Qiao Zhou and famed scholar, generally avoided public affairs despite rank. Du Qiong was affiliated with Liu Zhang and the Shu Kingdom. Du Qiong lived during the Three Kingdoms periods of Chinese history.
